prompt: Create a highly realistic vertical indoor studio portrait of a young Pakistani couple wearing coordinated beige traditional formal outfits. The woman stands in front, slightly left of center, with long straight glossy black hair parted near the middle, wearing an elegant beige saree covered with intricate gold embroidery, beadwork, sequins, a heavily embellished border, a delicate necklace, bangles, and natural bridal-style styling. The man stands close behind her on the right, slightly taller, wearing a cream-beige embroidered sherwani with a high collar and subtle patterned texture; his arms wrap gently around her waist with both hands visible over the saree. Both face the camera with calm romantic expressions. Use a plain light gray wall background, soft diffused indoor lighting, natural shadows, realistic skin tones, shallow depth of field, premium wedding portrait photography, full upper-body to mid-leg framing, vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people. The overall mood is intimate, elegant, and polished, with matching neutral beige and gold tones.
